nodes.summary: Local React + Vite replica with placeholder imagery and working local routes.

nodes.label: ClassOneSystem replica

nodes.label: Placeholder imagery
nodes.rationale: Structured placeholder images stand in for the live site media while keeping the page hierarchy and visual rhythm intact.
